title: pouteria pallida
intro: Pouteria pallida, also known as the White Sapote, is a species of plant native to Central America and Mexico, belonging to the family Sapotaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Pouteria pallida include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce cholesterol levels, and act as an antioxidant, protecting against cell damage and oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of Pouteria pallida can be consumed as a juice or tea, with some traditional remedies also using the plant's sap for wound healing and skin care.
